_comment: Reconstruction of the May 2026 Grok/Bankr prompt-injection drain (~$175K) as an EIV scenario. The signed authorization: swap at most 175,000 USDC for WETH via the authorized router on Base, output to the user's wallet, bounded approval, allowance zeroed after execution. Token/router addresses are the real Base mainnet contracts; user/attacker addresses are illustrative.
